race.comment: REGAL SECRET (7) has been below her best at her past two in Adelaide but is better than that and has placed here. Look for a better run with Neindorf booked in an open race. HAPPY LINK (10) resumes off good jumpout form. Her synthetic form isn't flash but she's well up to this class and has raced well fresh. She can figure. LULU DARLING (12) is going okay without winning, off a let up for the drop in trip now. She loves it here and that can prove key against a few without synthetic form. MR BUTT'S BOATS (3) is going well in some decent races, first go synthetic here but can roll forward and give a sight.
